g.text: M2: Call Graph & Flame Graph Generation
config: SamplerConfig handler: SignalHandler active: AtomicBool } sampler_config: { shape: sql_table label: "SamplerConfig [sampler/config.rs]" fields:

thread_id: u64 @ 0x00 timestamp_ns: u64 @ 0x08 cpu_id: u32 @ 0x10 depth: u16 @ 0x14 flags: SampleFlags @ 0x16 addresses: u64_array_128 @ 0x18 } unwinder: { shape: class label: "Unwinder\n[unwinder/mod.rs]" fields:
data: Box_AtomicPtr_T @ 0x00 capacity: usize @ 0x08 head: AtomicUsize @ 0x10 tail: AtomicUsize @ 0x14 } profiler_state: { shape: sql_table label: "ProfilerState [state/global.rs]" fields:
nodes: HashMap_u64_CallGraphNode edges: HashMap<(u64, u64), EdgeInfo> total_samples: uint64 } callgraph_node: { shape: sql_table label: "CallGraphNode [callgraph/node.rs]" fields:
buffer: Vec_u8 separator: uint8 } flamegraph_renderer: { shape: class label: "FlameGraphRenderer\n[flamegraph/svg.rs]" fields:
allocations: HashMap<u64, AllocationInfo> total_allocated: AtomicU64 total_freed: AtomicU64 peak_usage: AtomicU64 } leak_detector: { shape: class label: "LeakDetector\n[memory/leak.rs]" fields:
status: Status @ 0x00 current_waker: WakerId @ 0x04 last_poll_start: Option_u64 @ 0x08 } spawn_tracker: { shape: class label: "SpawnTracker\n[async_profiler/spawn.rs]" fields:
current_task: ThreadLocal_Option_TaskId context_switches: Vec_ContextSwitch } poll_record: { shape: sql_table label: "PollRecord [async_profiler/poll.rs]" fields:

strings: StringInterner functions: HashMap<u64, Function> locations: HashMap<u64, Location> samples: Vec_Sample } string_interner: { shape: sql_table label: "StringInterner [export/intern.rs]" fields:
cache: HashMap<u64, SymbolInfo> debug_info: Option_DebugInfo } symbol_info: { shape: sql_table label: "SymbolInfo [symbols/info.rs]" fields:
port: uint16 collector: ProfileCollector } record_config: { shape: sql_table label: "RecordConfig [cli/config.rs]" fields:
